title: AI Thought Experiment Triggers Stock Market Plunge
summary: An AI thought experiment on Substack is causing market turmoil, reflecting Wall Street's growing fears about AI's impact.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the market's sensitivity to AI-related news and potential for rapid shifts in investor sentiment.

title: Kalshi's Prediction Market Model Questioned
summary: Kalshi defends its prediction market model, arguing it's not gambling but beneficial for society.
